name: US East users resolve to IAD PoP
description: Verify US East coast requests are routed to the Ashburn (IAD) Akamai edge PoP.
preconditions: Akamai property 'www.example.com' version 42 must be active in the target environment.
expectedBehavior: Verify US East coast requests are routed to the Ashburn (IAD) Akamai edge PoP.
documentation:
Verify US East coast requests are routed to the Ashburn (IAD) Akamai edge PoP.

This test is part of the A.W.A.R.E. CDN regression suite and runs against live Akamai edge infrastructure.
